3、作者更新的速度还望加快，才写几章怎么看！💪💪"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1635146425,"group_id":"7016896608868502559","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBqvWzoKOq247ecjjs0JM8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/996c86616d384cc78ecfff2e9cd9e797~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529178&x-signature=%2BLaU1PJSGZ62NwCvDurromAHF2U%3D","user_id":"95017629714","user_name":"帅的不得了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95017629714","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1686719875,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7016896608868502559","book_info":{"abstract":"陆凡刚重生特种兵世界，就碰上夜老虎集体裁军。
小庄等人集体抗命，所有人束手无策。
就在此刻，陆凡开启系统，主动请缨。
但他并没有解散夜老虎，而是将他硬生生练成一支特战部队。
两个月后，全军比武。
军区高层吃惊发现，这个即将被解散的连队，居然把特种部队都比了下去！
总司令高世巍无比震惊：”不是说去解散夜老虎嘛，怎么硬生生给我打造出一支王牌特战部队来？“","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/7462725763f000c2935a7f4784b1a7da","author":"上树逮猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7016896608868502559","book_name":"创建龙魂，我成为传说龙刺","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7016931494182519309","read_count":"12043","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1760447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"818","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,系统,穿越,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/408fd276cc5de9a82b3619e668c2758f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174403&x-signature=Rr2B1TMrJR1DKvUb6KssFUkj4jw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3324523032357848","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.897303e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015064374FAE1FE5BFB43E44B8E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":125,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4897,"reply_count":30,"show_pv":237512},"user_acti action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7093074072724063012","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说的文笔真的很好，起码我觉得9.0的评分配不上作者的文笔，应该10.0的！看了别的同类型小说，我才知道。这本小说我愿称为同类型文笔的天花板，把每个“麻烦”和解决每个“麻烦”写的及其细节，由于本人文笔不佳，不能很好描述出来，大家可以去看看的，细节写的特别细，情感都藏在细节里面，要是写的再“基情”一点，我都要磕CP了（开个玩笑，抱歉），看的真的很爽，基本有个长期“麻烦”也会很快的解决，爽文标配！更重要的是没有女主，女孩子在里面会成为“反派”，看得我都怀疑作者是钢铁直男嘛，不过爽是真的爽。三个字，给我看！
说不好的地方就是更新太慢了，害得我要养肥一点才舍得看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1651485005,"group_id":"7016896608868502559","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"视角即正义嘛？爱就是要有距离感。认了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0YXVTXmeTMUXjnhI47imJUSzOhsU2GD1rwZPLrwCyqJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6c7c9cbd4c7849e3883b585c15251ccb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533869&x-signature=B4k%2B97R39p0gOyxCGg4PwN6qvJs%3D","user_id":"2801992015296765","user_name":"敬请开心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2801992015296765","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1712943354,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7016896608868502559","book_info":{"abstract":"陆凡刚重生特种兵世界，就碰上夜老虎集体裁军。
